title: The Digital Omnibus: Europe’s chance to lead, not just legislate [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe's AI regulatory push is moving fast, but speed without coherence risks undermining the very innovation it seeks to unleash. MedTech Europe sets out what proportionate, workable AI rules must deliver for patients and the healthcare sector.
